title: Rockets, missiles and drones fly across Iran and Israel; Middle East remains tense — how the war is unfolding
summary_full: Escalating Middle East conflict sees Israel strike Lebanon and intercept Iranian missiles. A US submarine sank an Iranian warship, while Iran retaliated with strikes across the region. The US Senate backed President Trump's military actions against Iran. Energy supplies are threatened as oil prices soar and global markets react.
